Id1.text: The A.E Dimitra Efxeinoupolis club is located in Greece, where there are leaders called Nikos Voutsis and Prokopis Pavlopoulos.

Id2.text: There are two prominent leaders in Greece: Nikos Voutsis and Prokopis Pavlopoulos as well the A.E. Dimitra Efxeinoupolis is located there.

Id3.text: A.E Dimitra Efxeinoupolis is located in Greece, the leader of the country is Nikos Voutsis and/or Prokopis Pavlopoulos.
